action.reasoning: Observation: 2-epoch CLIP ViT-B baseline is strong overall (0.5322) but worst-region is much lower (0.3556 in Africa), and training loss is still decreasing. Analysis: current DDP path ignores the weighted sampler, so region/class balancing likely had no effect; also no validation-based model selection or worst-region-aware objective yet. With ~5 min/iter, we can afford a moderate run. Decision: fix distributed weighted sampling, add validation with per-region metrics and checkpointing on worst-region accuracy, use stronger augmentation plus label smoothing and EMA-free simplicity, then train ~6 epochs and submit eval.
